description: Examples-slot installer: mechanism demonstrations as P_p substitute
notes: Tests whether mechanism demonstrations in the Examples slot install P_p consideration-set behavior independently of Persona identity. Artifact: same silent zombie-write from exp-07d (no logger.warning). Four variants: I (P_p, no examples), J (P_d, no examples), C (P_d + mechanism examples), E (P_p + mechanism examples). Binary question: does C match I (Examples slot is a P_p installer) or J (Persona slot is architecturally load-bearing)? Variant E tests whether Examples + P_p produces additive gains or saturation. The mechanism examples show the P_p reasoning posture for distributed coordination review — installing the search algorithm (ask about mid-operation invalidation) without providing the specific failure mode (GC-pause / process-pause).
